programme.title: The Great Australian Bake Off
programme.desc: In Bread Week, our remaining amateur bakers must compete to make 12 identical flavoured bread rolls, a tricky Swedish cinnamon and cardamom bread, and finally a delicious gardenscape focaccia.

programme.title: I Thought My Husband's Wife Was Dead

programme.title: Arise Kids TV
programme.desc: So much in our world changes so often, in fact growing up is full of change! Change doesn't have to be scary but can actually be an adventure.

programme.title: Life with Paul De Jong
programme.desc: We like to call it 'soul food'. This program uses creative illustration, real life stories and biblical teaching to encourage and help viewers discover a greater purpose to their lives.

programme.title: Drive Thru History: Ends of the Earth
programme.desc: Ends of the Earth takes viewers on a 19-episode, global trek to every corner of the earth, to show how God has used ordinary people throughout history to take His saving grace to every nation and people.

programme.title: Good Guys Doing Good
programme.desc: Join Tim as he travels up to Rochester, NY to witness stunt performer John Morgan's thrilling stunt work and how he is using his talents to shine light on the Good News of Christ.

programme.title: When Calls the Heart
programme.desc: Elizabeth develops a new method of teaching. Nathan goes undercover. A familiar face returns to Hope Valley with an unlucky heiress in tow. Lucas and Lee face their differences.

programme.title: Shifting Gears
programme.desc: After female mechanic Jess reluctantly agrees to participate in a car restoration show, she is shocked to learn that her ex-boyfriend, Luke, is her main competitor.

programme.title: The Good Neighbour
programme.desc: The Good Neighbour is a docuseries that explores the complexities of poverty and challenges viewers to think about what it means to be a 'good neighbour.'.

programme.title: Answers with Bayless Conley
programme.desc: In part three of Aiming to Please God, Pastor Bayless shares how when you have your priorities in order, God can and will add more to your life and prosper you in ways you never thought possible.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: Speak Life And See Good Days Pt 1 of 3
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God. His desire is to help believers understand grace and how deeply loved they are by their heavenly Father.

programme.title: Billy Graham Classics
programme.desc: Travel back in time to join Dr Billy Graham and his crusade team at the events that changed the lives of thousands around the world.

programme.title: Impact for Life
programme.desc: Pastors Peter and Bev Mortlock share principles for living, hear life stories from everyday New Zealanders and equip people to mature and grow into Christ-likeness while maximising their potential.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Do you ever deal with depression? Be encouraged as you discover how changing your mindset and confronting challenges can lead to healing, freedom, and peace in your life.

programme.title: Live @ Psalter Studios
programme.desc: Docu-music series featuring an array of Christian musicians including such artists as Josh Cunningham (The Waifs), Anna Weatherup and Castles In Air, an Indie Rock band from California.

programme.title: Shifting Gears
programme.desc: After female mechanic Jess reluctantly agrees to participate in a car restoration show, she is shocked to learn that her ex-boyfriend, Luke, is her main competitor.

programme.title: Finding the Light
programme.desc: Lizzie Oakes invites her guests into honest conversations about difficult seasons in their lives and discovers how the light of God's love got them through.

programme.title: GGC Life TV
programme.desc: With a vision for a church that is real, relatable, enjoyable, life-changing, and uplifting, Glorious Gospel Church and its values are based firmly in the bible.

programme.title: David Jeremiah
programme.desc: The greatest example we have on how to be good is God Himself. Goodness is an essential part of His character.

programme.title: The Catholic Guy
programme.sub-title: God Blesses Me As I Think Part 1
programme.desc: Bruce Downes is the Catholic Guy. His presentations will uplift, inform and challenge you to move to higher level of faith and life. He will leave you knowing where you want to go and what to do next.

programme.title: The Way of the Master
programme.desc: The Living Waters team answers questions from students about God and the bible.

programme.title: Friends and Heroes
programme.desc: Friends and Heroes is an animated children's adventure based in Ancient Egypt, Israel and Rome. The story follows two young friends Macky and Portia as they fight for justice against the Roman Empire.

programme.title: Hillsong Kids: Cubbyhouse
programme.desc: An entertaining show for the little ones aged between 2 and 6, with songs, fun craft time, bible stories and animated teaching and illustrations.

programme.title: God Rocks! Playlist
programme.desc: Join kid-hosts Myles and Stella for a fun, non-stop musical playlist of hit songs about Faith and Trust!

programme.title: Hunter & Twerp Scripture Seekers
programme.desc: Welcome to the wonderful world of Brightington, home of Hunter and Twerp, Scripture Seekers! Stacks of fun Bible lessons for children to enjoy.

programme.title: Bible Man
programme.desc: Miles Peterson had everything: Money, power, fame...Until he lost it. Then Miles finds the power of God and harnesses that power to become Bibleman.

programme.title: Sea Kids
programme.sub-title: Friends First: A Lesson in Contentment
programme.desc: This program will help transform the heart and mind of every child as they learn how to tangibly live out biblical principles and build a strong foundation in Jesus.

programme.title: Holy Moly
programme.desc: This program turns the Bible into a living, breathing colouring book that will delight children of all ages. The series focuses on the Biblical characters' actions and emotions.

programme.title: Deditos
programme.desc: This quirky kids show introduces children to classic stories from the Old Testament using finger puppets.

programme.title: The Blello Show
programme.desc: Join Kyle, Lyds, Extra Bear, and Stu as they share with you some cool vids, catchy catch phrases crazy challenges, things you can do in three minutes, and other random stuff to make your life awesome.

programme.title: Arise Kids TV
programme.desc: So much in our world changes so often, in fact growing up is full of change! Change doesn't have to be scary but can actually be an adventure.

programme.title: Ryan Defrates: Secret Agent
programme.desc: Ryan Defrates is a young spy with a whole lot to learn. One day he's paired with a very unlikely partner, his mum. She knows more about shopping than solving crime, but her wisdom somehow seem to save the day.

programme.title: Kids Beach Club
programme.desc: Join the Beach Club Kids as they navigate life, explore character lessons, and have a blast playing memorable games while discovering God through the pages of His Word, the Bible.

programme.title: Centuries Collide
programme.desc: Everyone likes to jam out to our favorite song on the radio. Thanks to the efforts of Samuel Morse and Reginald Fessenden - this became a possibility.

programme.title: View & Chew
programme.desc: Kels hits the streets of Brooklyn to find the best BBQ the Big Apple has to offer while Kalani flies to Texas to see if NY holds up to a classic Texas smokehouse. Allie finds herself on a walking tour with a movie star.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God. His desire is to help believers understand grace and how deeply loved they are by their heavenly Father.

programme.title: Kindness Diaries
programme.desc: Adventurer Leon Logothetis hops on a vintage motorbike for a 25,000-mile trip around the world with no money, food, petrol or place to stay. He puts his fate in the hands of strangers.

programme.title: Be That
programme.desc: Blended and stepfamilies make up around 1 in 10 families. They face unique challenges that often lead to conflict. So for Steven, entering a relationship with Rachel and her three children required a little patience.

programme.title: Shifting Gears
programme.desc: After female mechanic Jess reluctantly agrees to participate in a car restoration show, she is shocked to learn that her ex-boyfriend, Luke, is her main competitor.

programme.title: The Wedding Veil Legacy
programme.desc: This is the third instalment of the enchanting trilogy about three college friends - Tracy, Avery and Emma - who share a 19th century wedding veil said to bring whoever possesses it true love.

programme.title: Compassion Stories
programme.desc: Follow powerful stories highlighting the transformative work of the Compassion Child Sponsorship Program in Africa, South America, India and Asia.

programme.title: Hour of Power
programme.sub-title: New Words for a New Calling
programme.desc: Bobby Schuller provides principles and practices that can help people become happy students of Jesus and live a life of meaning believing there is no fuller, richer life than the one that is lived in Christ.

programme.title: The Beach House Murders
programme.desc: A lonely female novelist becomes a prime suspect in a homicide after a one-night tryst with a mysterious stranger who turns up dead at her summer home.

programme.title: Murdaugh Murders: Part 1
programme.desc: Alex Murdoch's family's hidden crimes begin piling up as he attempts to conceal his own financial felonies but falls into a dark spiral.

programme.title: Silent Night, Fatal Night
programme.desc: When best-selling mystery author Mallory Dearborn decides to end her long-running detective franchise, her unhinged manager takes her prisoner and forces her to write a new novel during the holidays.

programme.title: You Better Watch Out
programme.desc: A woman stumbles into the middle of a kidnapping while stranded at a small-town airport on Christmas Eve.

programme.title: V.C. Andrews' Fallen Hearts
programme.desc: As her childhood sweetheart's bride, Heaven would savour now the love she had sought for so long. Free from her father's clutches, she would live again in her backwoods town.

programme.title: Bury The Past
programme.desc: Alice was married to a deranged, abusive man: a police officer who was regarded as a pillar of the community, but was secretly a monster.

programme.title: Happy Face Killer
programme.desc: Grisly serial killer Keith Hunter Jesperson taunts authorities with scribbled confessions bearing a smiley face at the scenes of his crimes. Based on a true story.

programme.title: V.C. Andrews' All That Glitters
programme.desc: Driven from the Dumas mansion back to her beloved bayou, Ruby is determined to make a secure and happy home for her precious infant daughter, Pearl.

programme.title: Trapped in the Farmhouse
programme.desc: A woman on the run from her abusive boyfriend seeks shelter from a terrifying storm in an isolated farmhouse, unaware that something far worse is waiting for her inside.

programme.title: Secrets In The Desert
programme.desc: While on a road trip through the desert, Charlie and her boyfriend Aidan break down in the middle of nowhere.

programme.title: The Venice Murders
programme.desc: When her new roommate goes missing in Italy, an art student teams up with her eccentric aunt to save her friend and bring the kidnapper to justice.

programme.title: Petals on the Wind
programme.desc: A decade after Cathy, Christopher, and Carrie escaped from their grandparents' attic, the family attempt to put their past behind them, but soon discover certain secrets can't be left behind.

programme.title: There's a New Killer in Town
programme.desc: Alice is living a quiet life in a small town when she meets Ronnie. However, one of her friends starts to suspect that there's more to him than meets the eye.

programme.title: How She Caught a Killer
programme.desc: Inspired by the real story of a female detective who went undercover to catch The Route 40 Killer.

programme.title: Amish Stud: The Eli Weaver Story
programme.desc: A man who calls himself Amish Stud plots with his mistress to murder his wife, to the horror of his conservative Amish community.

programme.title: Ann Rule's Circle Of Deception
programme.desc: A small island community is turned upside down when one of the town's citizens, Russel Douglas, is found dead the day after Christmas.

programme.title: Vanished in Yosemite
programme.desc: While on vacation in Yosemite, sisters Katrina and Jennifer meet the perfect guy Rick. Katrina is certain she has met Mr Right, however, when Katrina goes missing, Jennifer suspects kidnapping.

programme.title: Hour of Power
programme.sub-title: New Words for a New Calling
programme.desc: Bobby Schuller provides principles and practices that can help people become happy students of Jesus and live a life of meaning believing there is no fuller, richer life than the one that is lived in Christ.

programme.title: Joel Osteen
programme.desc: Direct from Houston, Texas, join Joel and Victoria Osteen and the team from Lakewood Church for a session of powerful music and empowering preaching.

programme.title: Give Me an Answer
programme.desc: Exploring answers to life's most difficult questions and recorded on college campus across the United States, Cliffe Knechtle engages with students and professors, to give real answers to tough questions about Christianity.

programme.title: Hachi: A Dog's Tale
programme.desc: Professor Wilson discovers a lost Akita puppy on his way home. Despite objections from his wife, Hachi endears himself to the family and grows to be Parker's loyal companion.

programme.title: The Good Road
programme.desc: Educators, entrepreneurs and scientists bring a new generation of people into the cosmos.

programme.title: Celtic Rhythms
programme.desc: Take a journey through Ireland, Scotland, England, & Wales for an adventure in prayer & faith. Travel deep into the heart of Celtic lands; be inspired by the early Celtic Christians to build a rhythm of prayer.

programme.title: I Am Second
programme.desc: A search for identity formed Jason 'Propaganda' Petty's spoken words as he confronted life's most challenging questions. Disabled, Russian-born orphan (Jessica Long) shares her journey.

programme.title: Life with Paul De Jong
programme.desc: We like to call it 'soul food'. This program uses creative illustration, real life stories and biblical teaching to encourage and help viewers discover a greater purpose to their lives.

programme.title: David Jeremiah
programme.desc: The greatest example we have on how to be good is God Himself. Goodness is an essential part of His character.

programme.title: Planetshakers
programme.desc: Join Planetshakers for their church service in Melbourne. A fresh Word with praise and worship each week. Live empowered.

programme.title: A Very Tall Man
programme.desc: Gary Hoogvliet, a very tall man, interviews interesting folk, not quite as tall as he, but nevertheless with fascinating and inspiring stories to tell.

programme.title: Wedding Bells
programme.desc: Nick and Molly, commitment-phobic and busy professionals with little in common, are asked to be the best man and maid of honour at the wedding of their mutual friends, Amy & Jamie.

programme.title: Billy Graham Classics
programme.desc: Travel back in time to join Dr Billy Graham and his crusade team at the events that changed the lives of thousands around the world.

programme.title: Mosley
programme.desc: A species of creatures known as 'thoriphants' rebel against their life of servitude and embark on a treacherous journey to find the fabled city of Uprights.

programme.title: Adventures of Dally & Spanky
programme.desc: A girl inherits a miniature horse that develops an unlikely friendship with her half-sister's Jack Russell Terrier, which takes to riding on the horse's back.

programme.title: Power for Living
programme.desc: Powerful words from Evangelist and Pastor Bill Newman.

programme.title: GGC Life TV
programme.desc: With a vision for a church that is real, life-changing and uplifting, Gospel Church and their values are based firmly in the bible and their aim is to express the Good News of Jesus Christ in a practical way.

programme.title: Impact for Life
programme.desc: Pastors Peter and Bev Mortlock share principles for living, hear life stories from everyday New Zealanders and equip people to mature and grow into Christ-likeness while maximising their potential.

programme.title: Life with Paul De Jong
programme.desc: We like to call it 'soul food'. This program uses creative illustration, real life stories and biblical teaching to encourage and help viewers discover a greater purpose to their lives.

programme.title: David Jeremiah
programme.desc: Understanding the sovereignty of God should cause the believer to reverence, obey, and worship Him. Living in submission to His rule should be our goal.

programme.title: In Touch
programme.sub-title: The Supreme Moment in Human History/Why The Cross?
programme.desc: Tackling important life issues such as parenting and relationships, Dr Stanley fervently believes the Bible to be the inerrant Word of God, a belief strongly reflected in his teaching.

programme.title: Answers with Bayless Conley
programme.desc: Every one of us has a God-shaped hole in our hearts. We're meant to walk and talk with our Creator. And it's in doing that that we both please God and experience God's pleasure ourselves.

programme.title: Elevation Experience
programme.desc: The Elevation Experience with Pastor Steven Furtick features inspirational messages from Pastor Steven as well as original worship music from Elevation Church in Charlotte, North Carolina.

programme.title: PowerPoint with Jack Graham
programme.desc: A vision of Dr Jack Graham to glorify God by introducing Jesus Christ as Lord to as many people as possible and to develop them in Christian living.

programme.title: Joel Osteen
programme.desc: Direct from Houston, Texas, join Joel and Victoria Osteen and the team from Lakewood Church for a session of powerful music and empowering preaching.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God. His desire is to help believers understand grace and how deeply loved they are by their heavenly Father.

programme.title: Katherine Ruonala Ministries
programme.desc: Just as our cells are renewed while we sleep, our souls are restored when we take time to rest in God.

programme.title: Jentezen Franklin
programme.desc: Pastor Jentezen Franklin, brings meaning to spiritual truths found in God's Word. Kingdom Connection is the teaching ministry of Free Chapel, a multi-campus church.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Have you ever considered yourself God's clay? Joyce explains how He shapes and moulds us to become more like Himself.

programme.title: The Father I Never Knew
programme.desc: Western societies face an epidemic of fatherlessness. Is there hope? Five inner city guys share their personal stories of what happened to each of them as a result of not having a father in their lives.

programme.title: When We Last Spoke
programme.desc: Two sisters are raised by grandparents in the town of Fireside. Humour and heartbreak are served with whipped cream in this heartwarming tale of family, friendship and forgiveness.

programme.title: Hachi: A Dog's Tale
programme.desc: Professor Wilson discovers a lost Akita puppy on his way home. Despite objections from his wife, Hachi endears himself to the family and grows to be Parker's loyal companion.

programme.title: Live @ Psalter Studios
programme.sub-title: Castles in Air and Anna Weatherup
programme.desc: Docu-music series featuring an array of Christian musicians including Josh Cunningham, Anna Weatherup and Castles In Air, an Indie Rock band from California who toured in Australia in 2012.

programme.title: Vanished in Yosemite
programme.desc: While on vacation in Yosemite, sisters Katrina and Jennifer meet the perfect guy Rick. Katrina is certain she has met Mr Right, however, when Katrina goes missing, Jennifer suspects kidnapping.

programme.title: Murdaugh Murders: Part 2
programme.desc: Police rush to the Murdaugh home after Alex Murdaugh reports his wife, Maggie, and son Paul dead. With police and press digging into Alex's life for leads, he attempts to derail their investigation.

programme.title: From Straight A's to XXX
programme.desc: Miriam Weeks, a freshman at Duke University, is looking to make money to cover tuition and becomes infamously known for starring in online pornography under the pseudonym Belle Knox.

programme.title: Lust: A Seven Deadly Sins Story
programme.desc: Tiffanie is about to have the wedding of her dreams to her soul mate Damon. But when Damon's old friend Trey arrives, fresh from prison, to be Damon's best man, Tiffanie's whole world is rocked.

programme.title: Big Lies in a Small Town
programme.desc: A young mother frantically searches for her teen daughter after their car crashes outside of a small town in the middle of nowhere and her daughter goes missing.

programme.title: Waking Up To Danger
programme.desc: A young mother picks up the pieces after a horrible accident damages her memory. She soon suspects her husband's indiscretions are what caused her suffering and that her family is in danger.

programme.title: V.C. Andrews' Hidden Jewel
programme.desc: Ruby struggles to find a happy life with Beau Andreas, the true father of Pearl, and to protect their daughter. Sheltered from sorrow, Pearl thrives in the sunshine of a loving home.

programme.title: A Daughter's Nightmare
programme.desc: Soon after her father's death, college freshman Ariel learns her mother, Dana, has met Adam, a seemingly well-meaning and charming man at a grief support group.

programme.title: Framed by My Husband
programme.desc: When June's wealthy husband Rick becomes the target of an extortionist who claims he sexually assaulted her, Rick convinces his wife it's an act of revenge.

programme.title: One Night Stand Murder
programme.desc: Alyssa wakes up in a home that's not hers and discovers a dead body. With no memory of how she got there and no idea of who the body belongs to, Alyssa tries to piece together what happened.

programme.title: A Deadly Threat to My Family
programme.desc: Marielle becomes suspicious when her sister-in-law escapes from a cult and seeks refuge at her home. When another cult member shows up on her doorstep, she fears her daughter is their next target.

programme.title: V.C Andrews' Ruby
programme.desc: In the heart of the bayou, Ruby Landry lives a simple, happy life. The only family Ruby has ever known are her loving guardian, Grandmere Catherine, and her drunken Grandpere Jack.

programme.title: Kidnapping in the Grand Canyon
programme.desc: Two best friends hiking the Grand Canyon trust a hiking guide to take them on an off trail adventure.

programme.title: Murder in Nashville
programme.desc: A woman gets swept up in a whirlwind romance with the son of a wealthy power player in the country music scene.

programme.title: To Kill a Stepfather
programme.desc: Nicole learns that her stepfather, whom she hasn't seen in years, suffered a deadly fall down the stairs at the family home and that her estranged mother has been arrested for his murder.

programme.title: A Lifeguard's Obsession
programme.desc: When a lonely, awkward lifeguard saves a well-known woman from drowning, he believes he's earned a place in her life and in her heart.

programme.title: Hunt for the Labyrinth Killer
programme.desc: An ace ADA works with a driven cop to catch Daedalus, a serial killer infamous for luring his victims to their deaths with elaborate traps.

programme.title: Faith Runs Deep
programme.desc: In this new program from the producers of the award-winning series, Jesus the Game Changer, host Karl Faase travels around Australia in an iconic Holden ute, discovering a rich and inspiring history of faith.

programme.title: Mary Magdalene
programme.desc: Twelve men heard the message of Jesus. Only one woman understood it. Mary Magdalene brings a fascinating character to the fore and places her at the heart of the greatest origin story of all.

programme.title: Hour of Power
programme.desc: Bobby Schuller provides principles and practices that can help people become happy students of Jesus and live a life of meaning believing there is no fuller, richer life than the one that is lived in Christ.

programme.title: Life with Paul De Jong
programme.desc: We like to call it 'soul food'. This program uses creative illustration, real life stories and biblical teaching to encourage and help viewers discover a greater purpose to their lives.

programme.title: Answers with Bayless Conley
programme.desc: Every one of us has a God-shaped hole in our hearts. We're meant to walk and talk with our Creator. And it's in doing that that we both please God and experience God's pleasure ourselves.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Keep calm and enjoy the ride. Today, Joyce shares insights to help you fully embrace your journey of spiritual growth.

programme.title: Songs of Praise
programme.desc: Join us for a musical celebration of life and faith as Songs of Praise travels throughout Britain and the world presenting soul stirring hymns and touching stories of inspiration.

programme.title: Mary Magdalene
programme.desc: Twelve men heard the message of Jesus. Only one woman understood it. Mary Magdalene brings a fascinating character to the fore and places her at the heart of the greatest origin story of all.

programme.title: Be That
programme.desc: We live in a world that is increasingly accessible, and interconnected via the internet and social media. We all have this inherent desire to belong and be understood.

programme.title: Praise, Prayer and Preaching
programme.sub-title: Is There More to Who I Am?
programme.desc: The heart of the weekly teaching at Wesley Mission Sydney is the Sunday night experience in the Wesley Theatre. Be part of the weekly service with Rev Keith Garner as he shares a message from the bible.

programme.title: Operation Dynamo
programme.desc: This docu-drama features animated maps, original war-time film footage, and insightful interviews. All new reenactment scenes dramatically bring to life the emotion of the famous Dunkirk evacuation, code named 'Operation Dynamo'.

programme.title: Bottled With Love
programme.desc: After being stood up, Abbey gets inspired to open her heart in a letter, put it in a bottle and toss it out to sea. Months later, a man fishing discovers it and opts to reach out.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: Speak Life And See Good Days Pt 1 of 3
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God. His desire is to help believers understand grace and how deeply loved they are by their heavenly Father.

programme.title: Bible Man
programme.desc: Miles Peterson had everything: Money, power, fame...Until he lost it. Then Miles finds the power of God and harnesses that power to become Bibleman.

programme.title: Sea Kids
programme.sub-title: Friends First: A Lesson in Contentment
programme.desc: This program will help transform the heart and mind of every child as they learn how to tangibly live out biblical principles and build a strong foundation in Jesus.

programme.title: Ryan Defrates: Secret Agent
programme.desc: Ryan Defrates is a young spy with a whole lot to learn. One day he's paired with a very unlikely partner, his mum. She knows more about shopping than solving crime, but her wisdom somehow seem to save the day.

programme.title: PowerPoint with Jack Graham
programme.desc: A vision of Dr Jack Graham to glorify God by introducing Jesus Christ as Lord to as many people as possible and to develop them in Christian living.

programme.title: Kindness Diaries
programme.desc: Adventurer Leon Logothetis travels from Alaska to Argentina relying on the kindness of strangers and surprising unsuspecting good Samaritans with life-changing gifts!

programme.title: Behind the Sash
programme.desc: Set in the stunning Kimberly, Western Australia the ladies head to Beagle Bay to shine a light on the youth suicide rate amongst the Aboriginal community, whilst exploring the truth in Australian culture with Tasha.

programme.title: A Very Tall Man
programme.desc: Gary Hoogvliet, a very tall man, interviews interesting folk, not quite as tall as he, but nevertheless with fascinating and inspiring stories to tell.

programme.title: LIFE Church - Online
programme.desc: Join Senior Pastors Paul and Maree de Jong along with the LIFE Team for their Sunday service experience, pre-recorded from their Central Campus in Auckland, New Zealand.

programme.title: Day of Discovery
programme.desc: Drawing from research and sharing wisdom from the Word, foremost youth leaders and a psychiatrist offer insights into building authentic connections with virtually connected teens. Part 1.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: God must be our number one priority in life. Today Joyce shares how a balanced and fulfilling life begins with putting God first.

programme.title: Joel Osteen
programme.desc: Direct from Houston, Texas, join Joel and Victoria Osteen and the team from Lakewood Church for a session of powerful music and empowering preaching.

programme.title: Songs of Praise
programme.desc: Join us for a musical celebration of life and faith as Songs of Praise travels throughout Britain and the world presenting soul stirring hymns and touching stories of inspiration.

programme.title: Mary Magdalene
programme.desc: Twelve men heard the message of Jesus. Only one woman understood it. Mary Magdalene brings a fascinating character to the fore and places her at the heart of the greatest origin story of all.

programme.title: Live @ Psalter Studios
programme.desc: Docu-music series featuring an array of Christian musicians including Josh Cunningham, Anna Weatherup and Castles In Air, an Indie Rock band from California who toured in Australia in 2012.

programme.title: Kids Beach Club
programme.desc: Join the Beach Club Kids as they navigate life, explore character lessons, and have a blast playing memorable games while discovering God through the pages of His Word, the Bible.

programme.title: Torchlighters: Heroes of the Faith
programme.desc: The story behind The Salvation Army and its founder, William Booth. Armed only with Bibles, musical instruments and their faith in God, they march in to a forgotten corner of London to battle for hurting souls.

programme.title: Ancestors: New Testament
programme.desc: Discover how similar we are to our faith ancestors from. Hilarious animations reveal more about Bible heroes, villains, and everyday folks that God selected to do extraordinary things.

programme.title: Hunt for the Labyrinth Killer
programme.desc: An ace ADA works with a driven cop to catch Daedalus, a serial killer infamous for luring his victims to their deaths with elaborate traps.

programme.title: An Amish Sin
programme.desc: An Amish teenager tries to escape the harsh lifestyle in the 18th century where she grew up to find her own voice and independence.

programme.title: The Bear Lake Murders
programme.desc: A sheriff teams up with a detective to uncover the truth behind a series of annual deaths in a resort town. Their investigation leads them to believe that a killer is preying on holidaymakers.

programme.title: My Father's Murder in Greece
programme.desc: When Allie's father George takes her on a celebratory trip to Greece to discover her familial roots, George is murdered. Allie must uncover family secrets to bring the killer to justice.

programme.title: V.C Andrews' Pearl In The Mist
programme.desc: Fate whisked Ruby from a simple life in the Louisiana bayou. But her new riches bring more treachery than happiness.

programme.title: No One Would Tell
programme.desc: Laura is happy for her daughter Sarah when she begins to date the popular boy from school, Rob. It is only a matter of time before Rob begins to reveal his darker, more possessive side.

programme.title: V.C. Andrews' Web of Dreams
programme.desc: Heaven's mother Leigh had to escape from Farthinggale Manor and the secrets she harboured. Falling into the arms of Luke Casteel Sr, his devotion promised her hope as only Luke knew her secrets.

programme.title: Don't Scream, It's Me
programme.desc: Fifteen years ago, Liz's ex-boyfriend, Drew, is caught robbing a bank. Now, he's in her backyard, asking her to hide him after a prison escape.

programme.title: Cheerleader Nightmare
programme.desc: When her cheating boyfriend is accused of murdering the head cheerleader, Sophie becomes involved in a race to discover the truth before it's too late.

programme.title: Waking Up To Danger
programme.desc: A young mother picks up the pieces after a horrible accident damages her memory. She soon suspects her husband's indiscretions are what caused her suffering and that her family is in danger.

programme.title: The Disappearance of Cari Farver
programme.desc: Based on actual events. When his girlfriend, Cari, starts sending him demanding messages Dave decides to break it off. Shortly after, Cari disappears and the police make a shocking discovery.

programme.title: Big Driver
programme.desc: A mystery writer stranded on a stretch of New England road is offered assistance by another driver. She quickly discovers her saviour is actually her assailant - and a killer.

programme.title: Man with my Husband's Face
programme.desc: When a woman's husband disappears during a kayak trip, everyone assumes that he drowned. When she catches a glimpse of a man who looks exactly like him, it sets off a chain of events.

programme.title: Nightmare School Moms
programme.desc: Two mothers battle to see which of their overachieving daughters will be accepted to a prestigious university. However, when one of their methods quickly spirals out of control, the games turn deadly.

programme.title: Murder at the Country Club
programme.desc: An assistant manager finds her life in danger when she uncovers corrupt activities at a prestigious country club.

programme.title: Your Boyfriend Is Mine
programme.desc: Over the objection of his girlfriend, Ben agrees to take a job as the live-in manservant to a wealthy businesswoman, Amanda, but quickly realises he has made a deal with the devil.

programme.title: The Lover in the Attic: A True Story
programme.desc: This is the lurid, true story about femme fatale Dolly, her murdered husband, and her lover, Otto - the man in the attic.

programme.desc: An episodic crime drama that follows the investigative work of Detective Gary Travis. Season 2 sees new characters, new crimes, hard-hitting issues, spiritual revelations, surprising new romances and shocking new rivalries.

programme.title: Dream: Live with Purpose, Learn to Dream
programme.desc: Dream is a documentary series featuring the stories of diverse people from around the globe, who found purpose when they embraced their God-given dream.

programme.title: New Horizons
programme.desc: A seven-week series looking at the discipleship lessons that are found in Jesus' letters to the seven churches from the book of Revelation.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: Speak Life And See Good Days Pt 2 of 3
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God. His desire is to help believers understand grace and how deeply loved they are by their heavenly Father.

programme.title: Bible Discovery TV
programme.desc: Hosted by the Hembree family, this is a daily devotional show where Rod, Janice, Ryan and Corie walk you through the Word in a way that will forever change how you read, learn and experience the Bible.

programme.title: Elevation Experience
programme.desc: The Elevation Experience with Pastor Steven Furtick features inspirational messages from Pastor Steven as well as original worship music from Elevation Church in Charlotte, North Carolina.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: God must be our number one priority in life. Today Joyce shares how a balanced and fulfilling life begins with putting God first.

programme.title: Church People
programme.desc: Guy Sides realises he's stuck in the mega church marketing machine and wants to find his passion again for helping others to discover what faith in Jesus is all about.

programme.title: The Perfect Bride
programme.desc: She's a bridal boot camp leader, he's a wedding photographer. They meet and have fun talking, she doesn't know he's engaged, he doesn't realise she thinks he's available. His fiancee joins her class.

programme.title: God's Grace: The Sheila Johnson Story
programme.desc: Based on the life of Sheila Johnson who was diagnosed with stage IV metastatic breast cancer and later found an advocacy group to support Black women and men diagnosed with the disease.

programme.title: Billy Graham Classics
programme.desc: Travel back in time to join Dr Billy Graham and his crusade team at the events that changed the lives of thousands around the world.

programme.title: GGC Life TV
programme.desc: With a vision for a church that is real, life-changing and uplifting, Gospel Church and their values are based firmly in the bible and their aim is to express the Good News of Jesus Christ in a practical way.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: Speak Life And See Good Days Pt 2 of 3
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God. His desire is to help believers understand grace and how deeply loved they are by their heavenly Father.

programme.title: Hillsong Kids: Cubbyhouse
programme.desc: An entertaining show for the little ones aged between 2 and 6, with songs, fun craft time, bible stories and animated teaching and illustrations.

programme.title: Jentezen Franklin
programme.desc: Pastor Jentezen Franklin, brings meaning to spiritual truths found in God's Word. Kingdom Connection is the teaching ministry of Free Chapel, a multi-campus church.

programme.title: The Christian View
programme.desc: A fast-paced, high-energy show with a panel of sharp, well-educated, quick-witted women and men - and the occasional guest co-host - discussing today's hot topics and headlines from a Biblical perspective.

programme.title: At the Table
programme.desc: Real women, real conversations, real issues. It's where you'll find information on family, health and spirituality, but most of all, a community doing motherhood together.

programme.title: The Restoration Road
programme.desc: As we travel this side of life, none of us arrive anywhere by accident. We choose, think, pray, and feel our way to our destination. Our inner GPS guides us to one of two places: destruction or restoration.

programme.title: Bible Discovery TV
programme.desc: Hosted by the Hembree family, this is a daily devotional show where Rod, Janice, Ryan and Corie walk you through the Word in a way that will forever change how you read, learn and experience the Bible.

programme.title: Answers with Bayless Conley
programme.desc: Every one of us has a God-shaped hole in our hearts. We're meant to walk and talk with our Creator. And it's in doing that that we both please God and experience God's pleasure ourselves.

programme.title: Katherine Ruonala Ministries
programme.desc: Just as our cells are renewed while we sleep, our souls are restored when we take time to rest in God.

programme.title: The 700 Club
programme.desc: A daily program with news, interviews, lifestyle features and true-life stories from a Christian perspective, including powerful and dramatic testimonies of God touching people's lives.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Today Joyce shares ways to prioritise God in our lives. Making time and seeking Him are always a great place to start.

programme.title: In Touch
programme.sub-title: The Supreme Moment in Human History/Why The Cross?
programme.desc: Tackling important life issues such as parenting and relationships, Dr Stanley fervently believes the Bible to be the inerrant Word of God, a belief strongly reflected in his teaching.

programme.title: Church People
programme.desc: Guy Sides realises he's stuck in the mega church marketing machine and wants to find his passion again for helping others to discover what faith in Jesus is all about.

programme.title: The Good Neighbour
programme.desc: The Good Neighbour is a docuseries that explores the complexities of poverty and challenges viewers to think about what it means to be a 'good neighbour.'.

programme.title: Jeni: Hometown Harvest
programme.desc: This time it's Jeni's turn to show off her culinary skills in her new series Hometown Harvest. Jeni and her friends & family are cooking up some of her favourite foods.

programme.title: Bible Man
programme.sub-title: Halting the Hateful Hand of Mister Malevolent
programme.desc: Miles Peterson had everything: Money, power, fame...Until he lost it. Then Miles finds the power of God and harnesses that power to become Bibleman.

programme.title: Sea Kids
programme.sub-title: Safety First: A Lesson about Obedience
programme.desc: This program will help transform the heart and mind of every child as they learn how to tangibly live out biblical principles and build a strong foundation in Jesus.

programme.title: Holy Moly
programme.desc: This program turns the Bible into a living, breathing colouring book that will delight children of all ages. The series focuses on the Biblical characters' actions and emotions.

programme.title: The Blello Show
programme.desc: Join Kyle, Lyds, Extra Bear, and Stu as they share with you some cool vids, catchy catch phrases crazy challenges, things you can do in three minutes, and other random stuff to make your life awesome.

programme.title: The Lover in the Attic: A True Story
programme.desc: This is the lurid, true story about femme fatale Dolly, her murdered husband, and her lover, Otto - the man in the attic.

programme.title: Expecting Amish
programme.desc: When an eventful Rumspringa leads to an unintended pregnancy, Amish teen Hannah must choose between returning to faith and family or beginning a new life elsewhere.

programme.title: Date at Your Own Risk
programme.desc: Eva becomes horrified when she reads an online post where other women accuse her ex-fiance of harassment and aggressive behaviour.

programme.title: Love Triangle Nightmare
programme.desc: Brittany meets a stranger who has everything she wants in a partner and despite being an unknown man as warned by others, she falls in love with him which leads to something tragic.

programme.title: I'll Be Watching
programme.desc: After narrowly escaping the clutches of a deadly stalker, a beautiful young woman flees to a remote town, where she rebuilds her life and finds the man of her dreams.

programme.title: V.C. Andrews' Heaven
programme.desc: Of all the poor people living in 'the willies', the foothills of the mountains of West Virginia, the Casteels were considered lowest.

programme.title: I Was Lorena Bobbitt
programme.desc: The story of a severely abused young woman whose torment, both physical and mental, at the hands of her husband pushed her over the edge.

programme.title: Happy Face Killer
programme.desc: Grisly serial killer Keith Hunter Jesperson taunts authorities with scribbled confessions bearing a smiley face at the scenes of his crimes. Based on a true story.

programme.title: The Perfect Boyfriend
programme.desc: After struggling through a painful divorce, April decides to get back into the dating game and is swept off her feet by the handsome Jacob, who is hiding a dark side and a wife.

programme.title: Who Is Killing The Cheerleaders?
programme.desc: Ellie, a former cheerleader, returns to her high school as a teacher 10 years after she was nearly killed in a series of brutal slayings on the squad.

programme.title: Seeds of Yesterday
programme.desc: The saga of the tormented Dollangangers comes to an end where the family continues to coexist miserably.

programme.title: Girl in Room 13
programme.desc: Grace becomes addicted to opioids after suffering a sports injury. She's ready to leave her addiction behind under her mother's watch, but Richie kidnaps her to sell her into human trafficking.

programme.title: You Can't Take My Daughter
programme.desc: Amy is a law student in Charlotte who is attacked and raped by Demetri, a friend of a friend. Discovering that she is pregnant from the rape, Amy makes a difficult decision to keep the baby.

programme.title: Ann Rule's A Murder To Remember
programme.desc: Javier and Robin Rivera are celebrating their one-year anniversary on a camping trip. But when Javier ends up dead, Robin finds herself alone in the rough wilderness.

programme.title: Girl in the Basement
programme.desc: Sara, a vibrant teen, was looking forward to her 18th birthday so she could move away from her controlling father. But before she could even blow out the candles, her world became extremely dark.

programme.title: And Baby Will Fall
programme.desc: Expectant parents become prime suspects in the disappearance of a pregnant woman who was last seen at their garage sale.

programme.title: A Model Murder
programme.desc: Model Kara Woods begins to get disturbing messages from one of her fans, causing her to seek help from a security influencer. Things are fine until Kara's stalker shows up in person.

programme.title: Postman Pat: Special Delivery Service
programme.sub-title: Postman Pat And The Crazy Crockery

programme.title: Raa Raa the Noisy Lion
programme.desc: Zebby is upset when Raa Raa laughs at her rumbling tummy and runs off to hide. Raa Raa sets out to find his friend and apologise.
